revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:十二所神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:十二所神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:十二所神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:十二所神社]]
'''Jūnisho Jinja''' (十二所神社), also referred to as '''Jūnisha Jinja''' (十二社神社), '''Jūni Hashira Jinja''' (十二柱神社), or '''Jūni Tenjin Jinja''' (十二天神社), are {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}} found throughout {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. Some of these shrines are also called '''Jūnishō''' (十二社).
These shrines can be categorized into two main types: 1. Shrines dedicated to local mountain deities called '''Jūni-sama''' (Twelve Lords), associated with ancient rituals and the customs of the "Twelve Lectures." These shrines are primarily found in mountainous areas of eastern Japan, especially in the northern {{ill|Kantō region|en|Kantō region|qid=Q132480|lt=Kantō region|1=Kantō region}} and {{ill|Kōshin'etsu region|en|Kōshin'etsu region|qid=Q398208|lt=Kōshin'etsu region|1=Kōshin'etsu region}}. Research indicates that 65% of the 438 shrines named Jūnisho or Jūnisha enshrine {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|en|Ōyamatsumi|qid=Q386563|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|1=Ōyamatsumi}} as their main deity. 2. Shrines that enshrine the {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} deities (known as {{ill|Kumano Gongen|ja|熊野権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Gongen|qq=}}). These were originally called '''Jūnisho Gongen-sha'''. During the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}}, many of these shrines modified their enshrined deities to the "{{ill|Heavenly Generations Seven|ja|天神七代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Generations Seven|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神世七代|1=Kamiyonanayo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3275893}}" and "{{ill|Earthly Generations Five|ja|地神五代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Generations Five|1=Five Generations of Earth Deities|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18337308}}," or the "Twelve Gods of the Heavenly Generation."
== Tōhoku Region ==
* {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Hirosaki)|ja|十二所神社 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Hirosaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579583|1=Jūnisho Shrine (Hirosaki)}} – Located in {{ill|Hirosaki|en|Hirosaki|qid=Q194087|lt=Hirosaki|1=Hirosaki}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|qid=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture|1=Aomori Prefecture}}.
== Kantō Region ==
* {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Oyama)|ja|十二所神社 (小山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Oyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579584|1=Jūnisho Shrine (Oyama)}} – Located in {{ill|Oyama, Tochigi|en|Oyama, Tochigi|qid=Q374511|lt=Oyama|1=Oyama, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Haga)|ja|十二所神社 (芳賀町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Haga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579585|1=Jūnisho Shrine (Haga)}} – Located in {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|en|Haga District, Tochigi|qid=Q1192087|lt=Haga District|1=Haga District, Tochigi}}, Tochigi. * {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Daigo)|ja|十二所神社 (大子町大子)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Daigo)|1=Junisho Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65249572}} – Located in {{ill|Daigo, Ibaraki|en|Daigo, Ibaraki|qid=Q1346817|lt=Daigo|1=Daigo, Ibaraki}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Jūnisha Jinja (Kawaguchi)|ja|十二社神社 (川口市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisha Jinja (Kawaguchi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579587|1=Jūnisha Shrine (Kawaguchi)}} – Located in {{ill|Kawaguchi, Saitama|en|Kawaguchi, Saitama|qid=Q387136|lt=Kawaguchi|1=Kawaguchi, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Kisarazu)|ja|十二所神社 (木更津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Kisarazu)|1=Jūnisho Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q99522890}} – Located in {{ill|Kisarazu|en|Kisarazu|qid=Q335427|lt=Kisarazu|1=Kisarazu}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Jūnishō (Shinjuku)|ja|十二社 (新宿区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnishō (Shinjuku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579589|1=Jūnishō Shrine (Shinjuku)}} – A historical district in {{ill|Shinjuku|en|Shinjuku|qid=Q179645|lt=Shinjuku|1=Shinjuku}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, near {{ill|Juniso Kumano Shrine|en|Juniso Kumano Shrine|qid=Q11568951|lt=Kumano Shrine (Shinjuku)|1=Juniso Kumano Shrine}}. * {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Musashimurayama)|ja|十二所神社 (武蔵村山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Musashimurayama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579590|1=Jūnisho Shrine (Musashimurayama)}} – Located in {{ill|Musashimurayama, Tokyo|en|Musashimurayama, Tokyo|qid=Q390806|lt=Musashimurayama|1=Musashimurayama, Tokyo}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Yokosuka)|ja|十二所神社 (横須賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Yokosuka)|1=Junisho Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q134892402}} – Located in {{ill|Yokosuka|en|Yokosuka|qid=Q200578|lt=Yokosuka|1=Yokosuka}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}; also known as "Miura Twelve Heavenly Deities." * {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Kamakura)|ja|十二所神社 (鎌倉市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Kamakura)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野神社 (鎌倉市)|1=Kumano Shrines in Kamakura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11568961}} – Located in {{ill|Kamakura|en|Kamakura|qid=Q200267|lt=Kamakura|1=Kamakura}}, Kanagawa. * {{ill|Jūni Tenjin Jinja (Chigasaki)|ja|十二天神社 (茅ヶ崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūni Tenjin Jinja (Chigasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579591|1=Jūni Tenjin Shrine (Chigasaki)}} – Located in [[:en:Chigasaki, Kanagawa|Chigasaki]], Kanagawa. * {{ill|Jūni Tenjin Jinja (Sagamihara)|ja|十二天神社 (相模原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūni Tenjin Jinja (Sagamihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579592|1=Jūni Tenjin Shrine (Sagamihara)}} – Located in {{ill|Sagamihara|en|Sagamihara|qid=Q209779|lt=Sagamihara|1=Sagamihara}}, Kanagawa. * {{ill|Jūni Hashira Jinja (Isehara)|ja|十二柱神社 (伊勢原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūni Hashira Jinja (Isehara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579594|1=Jūni Hashira Shrine (Isehara)}} – Located in {{ill|Isehara, Kanagawa|en|Isehara, Kanagawa|qid=Q734520|lt=Isehara|1=Isehara, Kanagawa}}, Kanagawa.
== Chūbu Region ==
* {{ill|Jūnishō (Ojiya)|ja|十二社 (小千谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnishō (Ojiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579595|1=Jūnishō Shrine (Ojiya)}} – Located in {{ill|Ojiya, Niigata|en|Ojiya, Niigata|qid=Q819174|lt=Ojiya|1=Ojiya, Niigata}}, {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Jūni Hashira Jinja (Ueda)|ja|十二柱神社 (上田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūni Hashira Jinja (Ueda)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579596|1=Jūni Hashira Shrine (Ueda)}} – Located in {{ill|Ueda, Nagano|en|Ueda, Nagano|qid=Q844852|lt=Ueda|1=Ueda, Nagano}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Jūni Tenjin Jinja (Numazu)|ja|十二天神社 (沼津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūni Tenjin Jinja (Numazu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579597|1=Jūni Tenjin Shrine (Numazu)}} – Located in {{ill|Numazu|en|Numazu|qid=Q241037|lt=Numazu|1=Numazu}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Jūnisha Jinja (Kakegawa)|ja|十二社神社 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisha Jinja (Kakegawa)|1=Jūnisha Shrine (Kakegawa)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11404814}} – Located in {{ill|Kakegawa, Shizuoka|en|Kakegawa, Shizuoka|qid=Q823988|lt=Kakegawa|1=Kakegawa, Shizuoka}}, Shizuoka. * {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Fukuroi)|ja|十二所神社 (袋井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Fukuroi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579598|1=Jūnisho Shrine (Fukuroi)}} – Located in {{ill|Fukuroi, Shizuoka|en|Fukuroi, Shizuoka|qid=Q821337|lt=Fukuroi|1=Fukuroi, Shizuoka}}, Shizuoka. * {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Ichinomiya)|ja|十二所神社 (一宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Ichinomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579599|1=Jūnisho Shrine (Ichinomiya)}} – Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|qid=Q270810|lt=Ichinomiya|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Taki Jūni Hashira Jinja|ja|多気十二柱神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki Jūni Hashira Jinja|1=Taki Jūnihashira Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11430820}} – Located in {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|qid=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, Aichi.
== Kansai Region ==
* {{ill|Jūnisha Jinja (Tenri)|ja|十二神社 (天理市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisha Jinja (Tenri)|1=Juuni Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11404815}} – Located in {{ill|Tenri, Nara|en|Tenri, Nara|qid=Q502196|lt=Tenri|1=Tenri, Nara}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Jūni Hashira Jinja (Sakurai)|ja|十二柱神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūni Hashira Jinja (Sakurai)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579600|1=Jūni Hashira Shrine (Sakurai)}} – Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|Sakurai, Nara|qid=Q127026|lt=Sakurai|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, Nara. * {{ill|Juuni-sho Shrine (Himeji)|lt=Juuni-sho Shrine (Himeji)|lt=Jūnisho Jinja (Himeji)|ja|十二所神社 (姫路市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Himeji)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Himeji|en|Himeji|qid=Q209801|lt=Himeji|1=Himeji}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
* {{ill|Jūnisha Jinja (Naruto)|ja|十二神社 (鳴門市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisha Jinja (Naruto)|qid=Q135579601|1=Jūnisha Shrine (Naruto)}} – Located in {{ill|Naruto, Tokushima|en|Naruto, Tokushima|qid=Q460812|lt=Naruto|1=Naruto, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Jūni Hashira Jinja (Awa)|ja|十二柱神社 (阿波市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūni Hashira Jinja (Awa)|qid=Q135579602|1=Jūni Hashira Shrine (Awa)}} – Located in {{ill|Awa, Tokushima|en|Awa, Tokushima|qid=Q791587|lt=Awa|1=Awa, Tokushima}}, Tokushima. * {{ill|Jūnisha Jinja (Kamikatsu)|ja|十二社神社 (神山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisha Jinja (Kamikatsu)|1=Junisha Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q107410085}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiyama, Tokushima|en|Kamiyama, Tokushima|qid=Q1350922|lt=Kamikatsu|1=Kamiyama, Tokushima}}, Tokushima. * {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Mima)|ja|十二所神社 (美馬市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Mima)|qid=Q135579603|1=Jūnisho Shrine (Mima)}} – Located in {{ill|Mima, Tokushima|en|Mima, Tokushima|qid=Q857828|lt=Mima|1=Mima, Tokushima}}, Tokushima. * {{ill|Jūnisho Jinja (Hidaka)|ja|十二所神社 (日高村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisho Jinja (Hidaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579604|1=Jūnisho Shrine (Hidaka)}} – Located in {{ill|Hidaka, Kōchi|en|Hidaka, Kōchi|qid=Q1156151|lt=Hidaka|1=Hidaka, Kōchi}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|qid=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Jūnisha Jinja (Ino)|ja|十二社神社 (いの町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisha Jinja (Ino)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579605|1=Jūnisha Shrine (Ino)}} – Located in {{ill|Ino, Kōchi|en|Ino, Kōchi|qid=Q1206590|lt=Ino|1=Ino, Kōchi}}, Kōchi.
== Related Articles ==
